response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering credentials across 13+ years of experience, this Principal Performance Architect role requires specialized expertise in hardware architecture, SoC/IP modeling, and GPU optimization that is entirely absent from the resume. His background is primarily in application and backend software development, with limited hardware-level work. The current AI-agent infrastructure role appears to be software/tooling-focused rather than hardware acceleration optimization.
strengths: 13+ years of multi-domain software development experience meeting the bachelor's degree + 8 years requirement
Demonstrated ability to optimize systems across different layers (low-latency apps, microservices, real-time databases)
Current involvement with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling shows awareness of modern AI ecosystems
concerns: No evidence of SoC, IP modeling, GPU architecture, or hardware design experience—core requirements for this role
Career trajectory is application/backend-focused; lacks the systems and hardware architecture foundation needed for SoC performance optimization
No demonstrated experience with SIMD/MIMD optimization, neural network inference acceleration, or hardware-software co-design

key_factors.factor: Missing SoC/IP Modeling and Hardware Architecture Expertise
No GPU Optimization or AI Accelerator Performance Analysis Background
Strong General Software Engineering and Multi-Domain Optimization Experience
